Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Local SEO critical fixes: H1 tags, Google Maps, phone schema

- Fix homepage H1 \(was h2 with mismatched closing tag\) with local keywords
- Add embedded Google Maps iframe to contact page for local trust signals
- Add mobile phone number \(+447971331814\) to LocalBusiness and ContactPoint schemas
- Improve About page H1 and title with local keywords
- Add Review schema to contact page for rich snippets
- Enhance contact page meta title with phone number for click-to-call

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cat > /tmp/check_titles.txt << 'EOF'
Pages and their titles/descriptions:

INDEX \(Home\):
- Title: "Home" 
- Meta Title Generated: "AUREA — Luxury Spa & Salon in Marylebone, London"
- Description: "AUREA is a luxury full-service spa and salon offering expert hair, beauty, nails, facials, massage and wellness treatments in an intimate, nature-inspired setting."

TREATMENTS:
- Title: "Luxury Hair, Beauty & Wellness Treatments"
- Description: "Explore our full menu of luxury hair, facial, massage, nail and wellness treatments at AUREA Marylebone. Expert care tailored to you."

ABOUT:
- Title: "About — Luxury Spa & Salon, Marylebone"
- Description: "Discover the story behind AUREA — founded by Vidal Sassoon-trained stylist Isabelle Laurent. Our philosophy, awards and commitment to wellness."

TEAM:
- Title: "Our Team — Expert Stylists & Therapists"
- Description: "Meet the award-winning artists, therapists and skin specialists behind AUREA luxury spa and salon in Marylebone. Dedicated to your transformation."

GALLERY:
- Title: "Gallery — Hair, Beauty & Spa Portfolio"
- Description: "Browse AUREA's portfolio of luxury hair transformations, skincare results, bespoke nail art, and our nature-inspired Marylebone salon interior. See real client results."

PRICING:
- Title: "Treatment Prices — Full Spa & Salon Menu"
- Description: "View the full AUREA price list for hair, facials, massage, nails and wellness treatments in Marylebone. Transparent pricing, no hidden extras."

BOOKING:
- Title: "Book an Appointment — Spa, Marylebone"
- Description: "Book your appointment at AUREA luxury spa and salon in Marylebone, London. Choose from 24 treatments, select your preferred stylist, and reserve your time slot online."

GIFT VOUCHERS:
- Title: "Luxury Spa Gift Vouchers from £50"
- Description: "Give the gift of AUREA luxury spa in Marylebone. Four beautifully presented voucher tiers — from signature treatments to full-day experiences, from £50."

CONTACT:
- Title: "Contact — Spa & Salon, Marylebone"
- Description: "Get in touch with AUREA luxury spa and salon in Marylebone, London. Find our address, opening hours, phone number, email, and nearest tube stations for easy directions."

PRIVACY:
- Title: "Privacy Policy"
- Description: "AUREA's privacy policy. How we collect, use, and protect your personal data."

TERMS:
- Title: "Terms & Conditions"
- Description: "Terms and conditions for AUREA spa and salon services, bookings, gift vouchers, and website use."

ACCESSIBILITY:
- Title: "Accessibility Statement"
- Description: "AUREA's accessibility statement. Our commitment to WCAG 2.1 AA compliance and inclusive digital experiences."

404:
- Title: "Page Not Found"
- Description: "The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved."
EOF
cat /tmp/check_titles.txt)
